articles.title_en: The Power of Proximity to Coworkres*
articles.title_cn: 与同事的接近性的影响
articles.abstract_en: Abstract How does proximity to coworkers affect training and productivity? We study software engineers at a Fortune 500 firm from 2019 to 2024, leveraging two shocks to proximity: the office closures in 2020 and the subsequent return-to-office mandates in 2022 and 2023. In both cases, co-located teams experienced bigger changes in proximity than distributed ones, facilitating difference-in-differences designs. We find that sitting near teammates increases coding feedback by 18.3% and improves code quality. Gains are concentrated among less-tenured and younger employees, who are building human capital. However, there is a trade-off: experienced engineers write less code when sitting near teammates. In national U.S. data, we find evidence that the rise of remote work has had scarring effects on young college graduates. In remotable jobs, young graduates’ unemployment rate increased relative to older graduates’ post-pandemic (2022–2024) compared to pre-pandemic (2017–2019), a pattern we do not observe in non-remotable jobs.
articles.abstract_cn: 摘要：与同事的接近性如何影响培训和生产率？我们研究了2019至2024年期间一家财富500强企业的软件工程师，利用两次接近性冲击：2020年的办公室关闭以及2022和2023年的返岗要求。在这两种情况下，共址团队的接近性变化幅度大于分布式团队，便于差异中差异设计。我们发现，坐在队友附近会使代码反馈增加18.3%，并提升代码质量。收益主要集中在资历较浅和年轻员工，他们正在积累人力资本。然而，这存在权衡：有经验的工程师在坐在队友附近时写的代码更少。在美国全国数据中，我们发现远程办公的兴起对年轻大学毕业生产生了创伤性影响。在可远程工作的岗位中，年轻毕业生的失业率在疫情后（2022–2024）相较于疫情前（2017–2019）高于年长毕业生，这一模式在不可远程工作的岗位中未观察到。

articles.title_en: Making the Invisible Hand Visible: Managers and the Allocation of Workers to Jobs*
articles.title_cn: 让看不见的手变得可见：管理者与员工岗位分配
articles.abstract_en: Abstract Why do managers matter for firm performance? This article provides evidence of the critical role of managers in matching workers to jobs within the firm using the universe of personnel records from a large multinational firm. The data cover 200,000 white-collar workers and 30,000 managers over 11 years in 100 countries. I identify good managers by their speed of promotion and leverage exogenous variation induced by the rotation of managers across teams. I find that good managers cause workers to reallocate within the firm through lateral and vertical transfers and generate large and persistent gains in workers’ career progression and productivity. My results imply that the visible hands of managers match workers’ specific skills to specialized jobs, leading to an improvement in the productivity of existing workers that outlasts the managers’ time at the firm.
articles.abstract_cn: 摘要 管理者为何对企业绩效至关重要？本文利用一家大型跨国企业的全部人事记录，提供了管理者在企业内部将员工与岗位匹配中的关键作用的证据。数据涵盖了200,000名白领员工和30,000名管理者，跨越11年，分布于100个国家。本文通过管理者晋升速度识别优秀管理者，并利用管理者在团队间轮换所带来的外生变动。研究发现，优秀管理者通过横向和纵向调动促使员工在企业内部重新分配，并带来员工职业发展和生产率的显著且持续提升。结果表明，管理者的“看得见的手”能够将员工的特定技能与专业岗位匹配，从而提升现有员工的生产率，这种提升在管理者离开企业后依然持续。

articles.title_en: A Cognitive Theory of Reasoning and Choice*
articles.title_cn: 推理与选择的认知理论
articles.abstract_en: Abstract We present a theory of choice in which attention to the features of options is determined by the decision maker’s categorization of the current problem in a set of problems she solved in the past. Categorization depends on goal-relevant and contextual problem-level features. The model yields heterogeneity in attention and choice in a given problem based on different past experiences and instability when changes in irrelevant context cause recategorization. We show that heterogeneous and unstable representations of a choice problem unify major biases in judgment and decision making.
articles.abstract_cn: 我们提出了一个选择理论，其中对选项特征的关注由决策者将当前问题归类到其过去解决过的一组问题中的过程决定。归类依赖于与目标相关和情境性的、问题层面的特征。该模型根据不同的过去经验，在给定问题中产生关注和选择的异质性，并且当无关情境发生变化导致重新归类时产生不稳定性。我们展示了对选择问题的异质且不稳定的表征统一了判断和决策中的主要偏差。

articles.title_en: Codification, Technology Absorption, and the Globalization of the Industrial Revolution
articles.title_cn: 技术知识编码、技术吸收与工业革命的全球化
articles.abstract_en: Abstract This article examines the global adoption of technology in the late nineteenth century. We construct several novel data sets to test the idea that the codification of technical knowledge in the vernacular was necessary for countries to absorb the technologies of the first Industrial Revolution. We find that comparative advantage shifted to industries that could benefit from these technologies in countries and colonies with access to codified technical knowledge, but not in other regions. Using the rapid and unprecedented codification of technical knowledge in Meiji Japan as a natural experiment, we show that this pattern emerged only after the Japanese government codified vast amounts of technical knowledge. Our findings shed new light on the frictions associated with technological diffusion and offer a novel explanation for why Meiji Japan was unique among non-Western countries in successfully industrializing during the first wave of globalization.
articles.abstract_cn: 本文考察了十九世纪晚期技术在全球范围内的采纳。我们构建了若干新颖的数据集，以检验技术知识以本国语言编码对于各国吸收第一次工业革命技术是否必要。我们发现，比较优势转向能够从这些技术中受益的产业，前提是这些国家和殖民地能够获得编码的技术知识，而其他地区则未出现此现象。以明治时期日本技术知识快速且前所未有的编码为自然实验，我们展示了这一模式仅在日本政府编码大量技术知识之后才出现。我们的研究为技术扩散过程中的摩擦提供了新的认识，并提出了明治日本为何在第一次全球化浪潮中成为非西方国家中唯一成功实现工业化的独特解释。

articles.abstract_en: Abstract We study technology sophistication using a novel approach that measures the sophistication of the most advanced (MAX) and the most widely used (MOST) technologies in key business functions within establishments. Using data from over 21,000 establishments across 15 countries, we find that establishments generally underutilize the most sophisticated technologies available in a business function. These MAX-MOST gaps are persistent and strongly associated with productivity both across establishments and countries. At the establishment level, there is substantial variation in both MAX and MOST, with MOST showing a more skewed distribution. MAX and MOST follow different life cycle patterns in low-income countries and among small establishments, and they exhibit different associations with several establishment characteristics and performance indicators. This evidence underscores the different nature of the technology upgrading processes that drive MAX and MOST.
articles.abstract_cn: 我们采用一种新方法研究技术复杂度，该方法衡量企业关键业务职能中最先进（MAX）和最广泛使用（MOST）技术的复杂度。利用来自15个国家超过21,000家企业的数据，我们发现企业通常未充分利用业务职能中可用的最复杂技术。这些MAX-MOST差距具有持续性，并且在企业和国家层面上与生产率高度相关。在企业层面，MAX和MOST均存在显著差异，MOST的分布更为偏斜。MAX和MOST在低收入国家及小型企业中呈现不同的生命周期模式，并且与多项企业特征和绩效指标表现出不同的相关性。这些证据强调了推动MAX和MOST的技术升级过程具有不同性质。

articles.title_en: “Compensate the Losers?” Economic Policy and the Origins of U.S. Partisan Realignment*
articles.title_cn: “补偿失败者？”经济政策与美国党派重组的起源
articles.abstract_en: Abstract We argue that the Democratic Party’s evolution on economic policy helps explain partisan realignment by education. First, we document that educated Americans differentially oppose “predistribution” (e.g., job guarantees, higher minimum wages, protectionism, and stronger unions), while the educational gradient for redistribution (taxes and transfers) is close to zero. These relationships have been largely unchanged since the 1940s. Second, focusing on politicians and donors as key party actors, we show that the Democratic Party has moved away from predistribution since the 1970s. The number of predistribution bills introduced by Democratic House Speakers has declined by half since the 1970s. Unions—the traditional lobbying force for predistribution—see their share of Democratic Party PAC donations decline from 90% to 40% from 1968 to 1980, following 1970s legislation that facilitated corporate PAC donations. From 1980 onward, the Democrats rely increasingly on individual contributions from educated donors relative to the Republicans. We show the increased reliance on corporate PACs and educated donors is driven by the rise of a self-described “New Democrat’’ faction particularly conservative on predistribution and social issues. Finally, we trace the reaction of voters to these changes in the Democratic Party. Less-educated Americans begin to leave the party in the 1970s, after decades of serving as its base. We also show that in the crucial transition period of the 1970s through 1990s, New Democrat candidates outperform other Democrats among more-educated voters in both survey questions and actual Congressional elections. As the New Democrats are more socially conservative than other Democrats, their success with educated voters suggests that social issues alone cannot explain educational realignment.
articles.abstract_cn: 摘要 我们认为，民主党在经济政策上的演变有助于解释按教育水平划分的党派重组。首先，我们记录到受教育程度较高的美国人对“预分配”（如就业保障、更高的最低工资、保护主义和更强大的工会）持有不同程度的反对态度，而在再分配（税收和转移支付）上的教育梯度接近于零。这些关系自1940年代以来基本未变。其次，聚焦于政客和捐赠者等关键党内行为者，我们显示民主党自1970年代以来逐步远离预分配。自1970年代以来，民主党众议院议长提出的预分配法案数量减少了一半。工会——传统的预分配游说力量——在民主党PAC捐款中的份额从1968年的90%下降到1980年的40%，这一变化发生在1970年代立法便利企业PAC捐款之后。自1980年起，民主党对受教育捐赠者个人捐款的依赖相较于共和党日益增加。我们显示，对企业PAC和受教育捐赠者依赖的增加，是由自称为“新民主党人”派系的崛起所推动，该派系在预分配和社会议题上尤其保守。最后，我们追踪选民对民主党这些变化的反应。受教育程度较低的美国人在1970年代开始离开民主党，此前他们已作为其基础数十年。我们还显示，在1970年代至1990年代这一关键转型期，新民主党候选人在受教育程度较高选民中，无论在调查问卷还是实际国会选举中，表现都优于其他民主党人。由于新民主党人在社会议题上比其他民主党人更为保守，他们在受教育选民中的成功表明，单靠社会议题无法解释教育层次的党派重组。

articles.title_en: Why Doesn’t the United States Have National Health Insurance? The Political Role of the American Medical Association
articles.title_cn: 为什么美国没有全国健康保险？美国医学会的政治作用
articles.abstract_en: Abstract This article examines how the American Medical Association (AMA) helped shape the development of the U.S. health insurance system in the critical period after World War II. Working with the political public relations firm Campaigns, Inc., the AMA launched a nationwide campaign to weaken support for national health insurance by framing it as “socialized medicine,” while simultaneously enrolling people in private health insurance plans to shift demand away from a public alternative. Drawing on newly assembled archival data, we find that greater exposure to the campaign explains about 20% of the rise in private health insurance enrollment and a comparable decline in public support for a national program. The campaign also appears to have influenced policy making through coordinated messaging, resolutions passed by civic organizations, congressional rhetoric, and political donations. These findings suggest that the rise of private health insurance in the United States was not solely due to macroeconomic forces or collective bargaining; rather, it was also enabled by a strategic, interest group–financed effort to shape citizen views and influence policy.
articles.abstract_cn: 本文考察了美国医学会（AMA）在二战后关键时期如何影响美国健康保险体系的发展。美国医学会与政治公关公司Campaigns, Inc.合作，发起了一场全国性运动，通过将全国健康保险描述为“社会化医疗”来削弱公众对其的支持，同时推动人们加入私人健康保险计划，以转移对公共替代方案的需求。基于新整理的档案数据，我们发现对该运动的更高暴露程度解释了私人健康保险参保人数上升约20%以及对全国健康保险计划公众支持的相应下降。该运动还通过协调的信息传递、市民组织通过的决议、国会言论和政治捐款影响了政策制定。这些发现表明，美国私人健康保险的兴起不仅仅是宏观经济因素或集体谈判的结果，还得益于由利益集团资助的战略性努力，旨在塑造公民观点并影响政策。

articles.title_en: The Effects of Mandatory Profit-Sharing on Workers and Firms: Evidence from France
articles.title_cn: 强制利润分享对员工和企业的影响：来自法国的证据
articles.abstract_en: Abstract Since 1967, all French firms with more than 100 employees have been required to share a fraction of their excess profits with their employees. Through this scheme, firms with excess profits distribute, on average, 10.5% of their pretax income to workers. In 1990, the eligibility threshold was reduced to 50 employees. We exploit this regulatory change to identify the effects of mandated profit-sharing on firms and their employees. The cost of mandated profit-sharing for firms is evident in the significant bunching at the 100-employee threshold observed prior to the reform, which completely disappears post-reform. Using a difference-in-differences strategy, we find that at the firm level, mandated profit-sharing (i) increases the labor share by 1.8 percentage points, (ii) reduces the profit share by 1.4 percentage points, and (iii) has small to nonexistent effects on investment and productivity. At the employee level, mandated profit-sharing increases lower-skilled workers’ total compensation and leaves high-skilled workers’ total compensation unchanged. Overall, mandated profit-sharing redistributes excess profits to lower-skilled workers in the firm without generating significant distortions or productivity effects.
articles.abstract_cn: 自1967年以来，所有法国拥有超过100名员工的企业都被要求与员工分享部分超额利润。通过该方案，拥有超额利润的企业平均向员工分配其税前收入的10.5%。1990年，资格门槛降低至50名员工。我们利用这一监管变化来识别强制利润分享对企业及其员工的影响。企业承担强制利润分享成本的证据体现在改革前在100名员工门槛处出现显著聚集现象，而改革后这一现象完全消失。采用双重差分策略，我们发现，在企业层面，强制利润分享（i）使劳动份额提高1.8个百分点，（ii）使利润份额降低1.4个百分点，（iii）对投资和生产率的影响微小或几乎不存在。在员工层面，强制利润分享提高了低技能员工的总薪酬，而高技能员工的总薪酬保持不变。总体而言，强制利润分享将超额利润在企业内部重新分配给低技能员工，而不会产生显著的扭曲或生产率影响。

articles.title_en: International Reserve Management Under Rollover Crises*
articles.title_cn: 展期危机下的国际储备管理
articles.abstract_en: Abstract This article investigates how a government should manage international reserves when it faces the risk of a rollover crisis. We ask: Should the government accumulate reserves or reduce debt to make itself less vulnerable? We show that the optimal policy entails initially reducing debt, followed by a subsequent increase in both debt and reserves as the government approaches a safe zone. Furthermore, we find that issuing additional debt to accumulate reserves can lead to a reduction in sovereign spreads. Evidence from a panel of emerging economies is consistent with these predictions: increases in reserves financed by public external borrowing are associated with lower spreads, and reserve holdings are not systematically drawn down during crisis episodes.
articles.abstract_cn: 本文研究了政府在面临展期危机风险时应如何管理国际储备。我们提出：政府应通过积累储备还是减少债务来降低自身脆弱性？研究表明，最优政策是先减少债务，随后在政府接近安全区时同时增加债务和储备。此外，我们发现，通过发行更多债务以积累储备可以导致主权利差下降。新兴经济体的面板数据证据与这些预测一致：通过公共外部借款增加储备与较低利差相关，且在危机期间储备并未系统性地被动用。

articles.title_cn: 企业、流动性与信息周期
articles.abstract_en: Abstract Stock markets play a dual role: they provide information about firms’ fundamentals, which improves resource allocations, and they provide liquidity. We propose a setting in which these two roles interact: if stocks are used more intensively for liquidity, then prices reveal less information about fundamentals. We structurally estimate stock price informativeness for several countries and show that it declines when alternative liquidity sources, such as banks, are in distress. To study the real effects of this mechanism, we devise a strategy to integrate our stock-trading module into a dynamic general equilibrium model with heterogeneous firms. We calibrate the model to the United States and simulate recessions with and without banking distress. In a standalone recession, prices become more informative and allocation improves, mitigating output losses by 4.4%. If the recession coincides with banking distress, agents rely more on stock markets to obtain liquidity, prices become less informative, and allocation deteriorates, magnifying output losses by 22%.
articles.abstract_cn: 摘要 股票市场具有双重作用：一方面提供关于企业基本面的信息，从而改善资源配置；另一方面提供流动性。我们提出一个情境，说明这两种作用如何相互影响：如果股票被更密集地用于流动性需求，则价格揭示的基本面信息就会减少。我们对多个国家的股票价格信息含量进行了结构性估计，并发现当银行等替代性流动性来源出现困境时，股票价格的信息含量下降。为研究该机制的实际效应，我们设计了一种策略，将我们的股票交易模块整合进一个包含异质性企业的动态一般均衡模型。我们将模型校准至美国，并模拟了有无银行困境的衰退情景。在单独的衰退中，价格信息含量提升，资源配置改善，从而减缓产出损失4.4%。如果衰退与银行困境同时发生，经济主体更多依赖股票市场获取流动性，价格信息含量下降，资源配置恶化，产出损失扩大22%。

articles.abstract_en: Abstract We study rainmaking as an instrumental religious belief. We present a model in which a religious leader tries to persuade people to believe. Praying for rain can persuade only where the hazard of rainfall during a dry spell is increasing over time, so that prayer is most likely to succeed when people most want rain. We present evidence from prayers for rain in Murcia, Spain, where the hazard rate is increasing, that the church’s prayers for rain predict rainfall over two centuries. To generalize this finding, we gather an original data set of whether ethnic groups around the world traditionally prayed for rain. We find that ethnic groups facing an increasing rainfall hazard are 47% more likely to pray for rain, consistent with our model’s prediction that societies are more likely to pray for rain where prayer is persuasive.
articles.abstract_cn: 摘要 我们研究祈雨作为一种工具性宗教信仰。我们提出一个模型，其中宗教领袖试图说服人们相信。祈雨只有在干旱期间降雨风险随时间增加时才能产生说服力，因此祈雨最有可能成功的时刻正是人们最渴望降雨的时候。我们提供了来自西班牙穆尔西亚祈雨的证据，在那里降雨风险率是递增的，教会的祈雨在两个世纪内能够预测降雨。为了推广这一发现，我们收集了一个原创数据集，记录世界各地民族群体是否有传统祈雨行为。我们发现，面临递增降雨风险的民族群体祈雨的概率高出47%，与我们的模型预测一致，即祈雨在祈祷具有说服力的社会中更为常见。

articles.title_en: The Effects of Gender Integration on Men: Evidence from the U.S. Military
articles.title_cn: 性别融合对男性的影响：来自美国军队的证据
articles.abstract_en: Abstract Do men negatively respond when women first enter an occupation? We answer this question by studying the end of one of the final explicit occupational barriers to women in the United States: in 2016, the U.S. military opened all positions to women, including historically male-only combat occupations. We exploit the staggered integration of women into combat units to estimate the causal effects of the introduction of female colleagues on men’s job performance, behavior, and perceptions of workplace quality, using monthly administrative personnel records and rich survey responses. We find that integrating women into previously all-male units does not negatively affect men’s performance or behavioral outcomes, including retention, promotions, demotions, separations for misconduct, criminal investigations, and medical conditions. Most of our results are precise enough to rule out small detrimental effects. However, there is a wedge between men’s perceptions and performance. The integration of women causes a negative shift in male soldiers’ perceptions of workplace quality. The decline is driven by units integrated with female officers, likely arising from female officers increasing men’s awareness of workplace problems or from men’s dissatisfaction from working with women in positions of authority—even though men in such units show some performance gains. If male-dominated workplaces are reluctant to incorporate women due to expectations that men will become less productive, our paper provides evidence to weigh against that notion.
articles.abstract_cn: 摘要：当女性首次进入某一职业时，男性是否会产生负面反应？我们通过研究美国最后一项针对女性的明确职业壁垒的终结来回答这一问题：2016年，美国军队向女性开放所有岗位，包括历史上仅限男性的作战岗位。我们利用女性逐步融入作战单位的过程，采用月度行政人员记录和丰富的问卷调查数据，估计女性同事的引入对男性工作绩效、行为和工作场所质量感知的因果影响。我们发现，将女性融入此前全男性单位并不会对男性的绩效或行为结果产生负面影响，包括留任、晋升、降职、因不当行为离职、刑事调查和医疗状况。大多数结果足够精确，可以排除微小的不利影响。然而，男性的感知与绩效之间存在差异。女性的融入导致男性士兵对工作场所质量的感知出现负面变化。这一下降主要由融入女性军官的单位驱动，可能源于女性军官提升了男性对工作场所问题的认知，或男性对与女性权威共事的不满——尽管这些单位的男性表现有所提升。如果男性主导的工作场所因担心男性生产率下降而不愿接纳女性，我们的研究为反驳这一观点提供了证据。

articles.title_en: Peer Effects and the Gender Gap in Corporate Leadership: Evidence from MBA Students*
articles.title_cn: 同伴效应与企业领导层性别差距：来自MBA学生的证据
articles.abstract_en: Abstract Women continue to be underrepresented in corporate leadership positions. This article studies the role of social connections in women’s career advancement. We investigate whether access to a larger share of female peers in business school affects the gender gap in senior managerial positions. Merging administrative data from a top 10 U.S. business school with public LinkedIn profiles, we first document that female MBAs are 24% less likely than male MBAs to enter senior management within 15 years of graduation. Next we use the exogenous assignment of students into sections to show that a larger proportion of female MBA section peers increases the likelihood of entering senior management for women but not for men. This effect is driven by female-friendly firms, such as those with more generous maternity leave policies and greater work-schedule flexibility. A larger proportion of female MBA peers induces women to transition to these firms where they attain senior management roles. A survey of female MBA alumnae reveals three key mechanisms: (i) information sharing, especially related to gender-specific advice, (ii) higher ambitions and self-confidence, and (iii) increasing support from male MBA peers. These findings highlight the role of social connections in reducing the gender gap in senior management positions.
articles.abstract_cn: 女性在企业领导层职位中仍然代表性不足。本文研究社会关系在女性职业晋升中的作用。我们考察在商学院中获得更多女性同伴是否影响高管职位的性别差距。通过将美国前10名商学院的行政数据与公开的LinkedIn个人资料合并，我们首先发现女性MBA毕业生在毕业后15年内进入高管职位的概率比男性MBA毕业生低24%。接着，我们利用学生被随机分配到班级的外生性，发现班级中女性MBA同伴比例越高，女性进入高管职位的概率越高，而男性则无此效应。该效应主要由对女性友好的企业驱动，如拥有更慷慨产假政策和更灵活工作时间安排的公司。更多女性MBA同伴促使女性转向这些企业，并在其中获得高管职位。对女性MBA校友的调查揭示了三种关键机制：(i) 信息分享，尤其是与性别相关的建议，(ii) 更高的职业抱负和自信心，(iii) 男性MBA同伴提供更多支持。这些发现强调了社会关系在缩小高管职位性别差距中的作用。

articles.title_cn: 最优信息披露下的串通
articles.abstract_en: Abstract Motivated by recent concerns surrounding the use of third-party pricing algorithms by competing firms, we study repeated Bertrand competition where market demand or the cost of serving the market is observed by an intermediary (or “algorithm”) that selectively discloses demand or cost information to maximize firms’ collusive profit. We show that an upper censorship disclosure policy is optimal, which leads to price rigidity and supra-monopoly prices in some states. Improving the algorithm’s accuracy reduces expected consumer surplus whenever it does so under monopoly pricing. When the state is positively correlated over time, the algorithm discloses more information when recent demand was lower or costs were higher. The analysis extends to a generalized model that accommodates product differentiation and capacity constraints. We relate our findings to recent antitrust cases.
articles.abstract_cn: 摘要 受近期关于竞争企业使用第三方定价算法的关注启发，本文研究了在重复Bertrand竞争中，市场需求或服务市场的成本由中介（或“算法”）观察，并通过选择性披露需求或成本信息以最大化企业串通利润的情形。我们发现，上限截断披露政策是最优的，这导致某些状态下的价格刚性和超垄断价格。当算法的准确性提升且在垄断定价下如此时，预期消费者剩余减少。当状态随时间正相关时，算法在近期需求较低或成本较高时披露更多信息。分析还扩展到包含产品差异化和产能约束的广义模型。我们将研究结果与近期反垄断案件相关联。

articles.title_cn: 私营管理下的公共服务
articles.abstract_en: Abstract Theory predicts that outsourcing public services to the private sector can reduce costs and improve efficiency but can also induce cost-cutting and compromise quality. We assess the Brazilian Organizações Sociais de Saude model (OSS), which outsources management of public hospital services to the private sector while the state remains the residual claimant. We show that this enhances hospital production and operational efficiency without adverse effects on hospital quality and equity. Increased inpatient production addresses previously unmet demand, expanding local access to hospital care and reducing population mortality. Performance gains arise from improved operational efficiency achieved through increased hospital management capacity. This facilitates staffing adjustments, favoring higher-skilled personnel, dismissing lower-productivity staff, and adopting flexible, performance-tied employment contracts. Effects are larger among private organizations with more management experience, underscoring returns to managerial capacity. Our findings show that incentive-ownership structures can address the quantity-quality trade-off in public service delivery, even when contracts are incomplete and quality is hard to measure.
articles.abstract_cn: 理论预测，将公共服务外包给私营部门可以降低成本并提高效率，但也可能导致削减成本和损害质量。我们评估了巴西健康社会组织（OSS）模式，该模式将公立医院服务的管理外包给私营部门，同时国家仍然是剩余索取者。我们发现，这一模式提升了医院产出和运营效率，并未对医院质量和公平性产生不利影响。住院服务产出的增加满足了此前未被满足的需求，扩大了当地居民获得医院护理的机会，并降低了人口死亡率。绩效提升源于通过增强医院管理能力实现的运营效率提升。这促进了人员配置调整，倾向于雇用技能更高的员工，解雇生产率较低的员工，并采用灵活、与绩效挂钩的雇佣合同。在管理经验更丰富的私营组织中，这些效应更为显著，强调了管理能力的回报。我们的研究结果表明，即使在合同不完全且质量难以衡量的情况下，激励—所有权结构也可以解决公共服务供给中的数量—质量权衡问题。
